promoteAfterDays.description: Min age in days before a verified entry can be promoted

requireVerified.description: If true, only verified entries are promoted

captureEnabled.description: If false, the capture hook records nothing

maxAutoEntries.description: Cap on auto-captured unverified entries; oldest dropped first

noteMaxChars.description: Max characters stored per captured note

lastGateAt.description: Watermark set by gate-hook.mjs; change entries captured at or before this are not re-gated

consolidateAfterDays.description: Raw entries older than this are rolled into digests

maxDigestThemes.description: Top themes kept in each digest note

category.description: Grouping heading in verified-knowledge.md, e.g. Payments, Auth, Maps

verified.description: True once confirmed correct in practice

source.description: Set on auto-captured entries by the capture hook, or 'dream' on consolidated digests

occurrences.description: How many raw captures a deduped/digest entry represents

lastSeen.description: Most recent capture time for a deduped entry

dreamedAt.description: ISO timestamp when a digest was created by dreaming
